title: Read the Signal Guided Flow
summary: A guided STATIC_FIXTURE-only path from Lab observation to local RunStore and Observatory comparison for read-only decision support.

steps.title: Open the Lab
steps.instruction: Open the public or local Lab and inspect the STATIC_FIXTURE signal.

steps.title: Export ExperimentContext
steps.instruction: Export or pass the ExperimentContext to the Notebook Workbench.

steps.title: Use the Notebook
steps.instruction: Follow the StudyTask prompts and create a StudyRecord.

steps.title: Log a local Run
steps.instruction: Log ExperimentContext, SignalSeries, StudyRecord, StudyTask, and metrics to the local RunStore.

steps.title: Inspect the Run
steps.instruction: Export the local Observatory and inspect the Run.

steps.title: Compare two Runs
steps.instruction: Repeat the task and compare two local Runs.

limitations: No command/control path or hazardous operating procedure.
Not a standalone authority for safety-critical operation or reactor design decisions.
